execution_model: Local human structural adjudication plus deterministic file parsing, hashing, schema validation, ordering, and agreement calculations. No model inference or network service participates in adjudication.

runtime.newline_policy: Preserve repository raw bytes; do not normalize before hashing

required_commands: python -m json.tool for every JSON input in this package
sha256sum over each frozen artifact's raw file bytes
network_policy: Disabled during packet generation, adjudication, reconciliation, metric calculation, and output assembly.
vendor_and_service_dependencies: None. No language model, embedding model, model provider, vector database, storage engine, cloud service, or application schema is selected.
randomness: No random sampling or stochastic inference. Case pseudonyms and order are determined by SHA-256 over the fixed ordering salt and case ID.
human_analysis_conditions: Adjudicator names are not a freeze prerequisite. Exact stable contributor IDs and eligibility declarations are bound after freeze in an immutable execution intake before any case packet, output, or result access.
Two primary adjudicators work independently until both ledgers are locked.
One separate tie adjudicator sees only retained disagreements after lock.
Stable contributor IDs are recorded for provenance; no participant measurements or personal data are collected.
The freeze authority and protocol, profile, rule, or case authors are ineligible to adjudicate.
freeze_requirement: The exact repository revision, dependency-file digest, platform details, and raw-byte digest of this artifact must be recorded in the frozen manifest or freeze attestation.
interpretation_boundary: Environment reproduction establishes procedural comparability only, not scientific replication, independence, or validity.
